prestazioni: Engine: F154 AM V8 3.8L Twin-Turbo (MCTU) with a custom Novitec Tridente Stage 3 ECU flash, increasing boost to 1.4 bar (20.3 psi) and optimizing ignition timing for 720 HP at 7,500 RPM and 680 lb-ft of torque at 4,500 RPM, paired with a Novitec high-flow carbon fiber intake system and upgraded fuel injectors (Bosch 1050cc/min)

Forced Induction: Twin Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbochargers with billet compressor wheels, upgraded wastegates, and custom 4-inch titanium downpipes (Novitec) to eliminate turbo lag and improve spool by 20%, supported by a Novitec high-capacity intercooler (12-row, 100% aluminum) and silicone charge pipes with T-bolt clamps

Drivetrain & Suspension: Quaife ATB helical LSD (part # QDF15F) for the ZF 8HP90 transmission, paired with a Novitec upgraded clutch kit (ceramic-metallic, 3-disc) and a custom driveshaft (aluminum, 30% lighter). Suspension features Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Maserati-specific valving, 8-way adjustable damping) with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (-25mm drop) and Novitec front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) for reduced body roll
estetica: Aero: Novitec Tridente widebody kit (carbon fiber, 50mm wider front fenders, 70mm wider rear) with integrated front splitter, side skirts, and a rear diffuser, paired with a Novitec carbon fiber rear spoiler (adjustable angle, +30% downforce at 120 mph)

Wheels & Brakes: HRE P101SC wheels (21x9.5 front, 21x12 rear, forged 3-piece, 15 lbs lighter per wheel) wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 R21 front, 325/25 R21 rear). Brembo GT-R big brake kit (396mm front rotors, 6-piston calipers; 380mm rear rotors, 4-piston calipers) with carbon-ceramic pads (Brembo CCM-R)

Exterior & Interior: Full Novitec carbon fiber exterior package (hood, trunk, mirror caps, door handles) with a custom matte Grigio Maratea paint job (PPG D8188). Interior features Novitec carbon fiber trim (dashboard, door panels, center console), Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG XL seats (heated/ventilated, 6-point harnesses), and a custom roll cage (MCS Motorsport, FIA-approved, bolt-in)
